description: Molinos Agro S.A. produces and sells grain, soybean, and cereal products. The company also provides animal feeding, including both pet-food, as well as poultry, pork and dairy production; and constructs and operates a biodiesel plant. In addition, it exports soy meal, soy hull pellets, crude soy oil, soy lecithin, biodiesel, refined glycerin, corn, crude sunflower oil, and wheat. The company was incorporated in 2016 and is based in Victoria, Argentina.
